Semiconductor equipment sympathy breakout — above 640 resistance on AI chip buildout demand. Volume confirmation from WFE spending outlook. 1-week swing for measured move.
Semiconductor momentum — above VWAP 251, 7.6% gap up continuation. RVOL > 3 signals institutional accumulation. Strong sector tailwind from AI memory cycle.

putSetups.rationale: Megacap tech weakness — below VWAP 282. Gap down continuation below 285 support. -6.12% momentum likely extends on sector rotation. 1-week target for swing low.

Volatility crush play — futures rallying, VIX 18.89 in normal regime. Mean reversion lower on risk-on sentiment. 0DTE if market gaps up and holds.

riskAssessment.vixRegime: VIX 18.89 (Jun 25 close) — normal regime (15-20). VIX9D 18.07 close to spot, near-term uncertainty priced equal to medium-term. No fear, no complacency.
riskAssessment.sectorRotation: Semiconductors (MU, AMAT, KLAC, SNDK, WDC) strongest on AI memory demand. Megacap tech (AAPL, MSFT) under pressure. Small-cap (IWM) mixed. Defensive rotation paused.
riskAssessment.earningsRisk: MU post-earnings blowout active — IV crush passed, momentum play OK. APOG pre-market today — small-cap, thin chain. XAIR after-close — micro-cap, avoid. NEOG post-close earnings gap down expected.
riskAssessment.macroRisk: May PCE released Thursday (headline 0.4% MoM, core 0.3% MoM, YoY core 3.4%) — inflation sticky above 2% target. FOMC hawkish hold last week (Jun 17), Fed funds 3.5-3.75%, half of FOMC members projecting hikes. Today: Advanced trade balance, consumer sentiment final. No major event risk, but CPI/FOMC hangover persists.
